reasoning: Gukesh Dommaraju's rating on the 2025-11-23 Wikipedia page is exactly 2763. To be at least 1% higher, his rating must reach 2791. Gaining 28 points for a 2760+ super-GM requires a spectacular classical tournament performance (e.g. +4 or +5 against top competition) due to the Elo system. For the first date, 2025-11-30, it is 99% likely that the Wikipedia page will literally still show the November 1st list (since the next list comes Dec 1), meaning his displayed rating will be exactly 2763 — making it impossible to resolve YES. For 2025-12-23, his rating will be based on the December FIDE list. It is overwhelmingly unlikely that he accumulated a massive +28 Elo gain in November 2025 without major news of a breakout win. By 2026-02-21, the February list will reflect games played in December and January (e.g. Tata Steel 2026). While slightly more plausible that he strings together some brilliant results over two rating periods to inch over 2791 (his career peak is 2787 in March 2025), a 28-point leap in just three months for a top-10 player remains highly uncommon. Thus, probabilities remain anchored near the strict lower limits, slightly increasing for dates further in the future in accordance with increasing time-horizon uncertainty.
